1758898124694.name: update Identlock2 + Reflect
1758898124694.content:
cd {{DB_DIR}}\
& git pull
& "{{DB_DIR}}\publish-db.ps1" `
    -Version "2.11.7.9-pre" `
    -DatabaseHostname "10.200.60.21" `
    -DatabaseName "IdentLock2" `
    -SqlUser "IdentLock2" `
    -SqlPassword "shgZ4Kjk8xNduymekoZg" `
    -DeploymentEnvironment "Stage" `
    -BuildDate (Get-Date -Format "yyMMdd")
& cd "{{DB_REFLECTOR}}\DbReflector.CLI"
& dotnet run --launch-profile "10.200.60.20 IdentLock2 - Ondra"
